generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance GearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox subsystem transmitting rotational torque from motor to robot axis"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft measuring motor output angle (r_M)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox measuring gearwheel output angle (r_G)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleData
]

instance SystemOutputEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Final encoder measuring system output angle (r_out) after cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SystemOutputAngleData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) to the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance SystemOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SystemOutputEncoder
]

instance TorqueVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentData, MotorAngleData, GearboxAngleData
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance MotorGearboxSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) describing motor-gearbox subsystem structure with rotational/torque flows"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MotorBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model simulating ideal gearbox behavior and Coulomb-Viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction dynamics for motor-gearbox subsystem"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance TorqueVelocityDerivedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque and velocity traces (ω*r_M, ω*r_G, ω*r_out) calculated from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SensorDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series sensor data traces (I_M, r_M, r_G, r_out) streamed via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData, MotorAngleData, GearboxAngleData, SystemOutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance FrictionModelMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata tracking data sources (sensor channels) and computational origins (Simulation M, Simulation GW)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueVelocityDerivedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink environment for executable friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming (I_M, r_M, r_G, r_out) to populate digital shadow"
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller providing axis control and torque/velocity conversion"
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time detection of static/kinetic/viscous friction losses via simulated vs. measured data comparisons"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentification, FrictionModeling
]

instance ControlOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive control algorithms adjusting friction models dynamically to reduce motion inaccuracies (up to 30%)"
    DTDFVocab:enables DynamicModelRefinement, MotionAccuracyImprovement
]

instance DiagnosticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard highlighting deviations (torque/velocity mismatches) to identify wear or environmental effects"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviationVisualization, WearDetection
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming of sensor measurements (I_M, r_M, r_G, r_out) via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataCapture
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionIdentification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time detection of static, kinetic, and viscous friction losses through white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models"
]

instance FrictionModeling : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Implementation of Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre friction models for accurate motion prediction"
]

instance DeviationVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual comparison of simulated vs. measured torque/velocity traces to identify friction loss patterns"
]

instance WearDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of wear effects through torque/velocity mismatches and environmental influences"
]

instance DynamicModelRefinement : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous exchange of friction models during operation via real-time data processing"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovement : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adaptive control adjustments reducing motion inaccuracies by up to 30% through optimized friction compensation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeDataCapture : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous streaming of sensor data (I_M, r_M, r_G, r_out) via MQTT protocol for digital shadow population"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C17: Environment
instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuator, GearboxActuator, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, SystemOutputEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance DigitalShadowEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SensorDataTrace, TorqueVelocityDerivedData, FrictionModelMetadata, MotorGearboxSysMLModel, MotorBehaviorModel, CoulombViscousFrictionModel
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time and near-real-time**:
  - **Data acquisition frequency**: Sensor data (e.g., motor current, encoders) is streamed in **real-time** via MQTT.
  - **Model processing latency**: Simulation models (e.g., Simulink) and processing components (e.g., Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB) operate at **low-latency** to enable continuous friction identification.
  - **Synchronization**: Data traces are aligned with physical system events (e.g., motor inputs, gearbox outputs) to support **multi-physics-aware** analysis."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is **single-axis specific** (first vertical axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot) but integrates:
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: Enables structured modeling of the robot’s mechanical structure and behavioral components.
  - **Processing Components**: MathWorks Simulink simulations and processing pipelines (e.g., Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB) for friction modeling.
  - **Data Orchestration**: MQTT for real-time data exchange between sensors and digital shadow components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates primarily during the **operational phase** of the robot:
  - **Purpose-driven**: Focused on **real-time friction analysis and control** during machining tasks.
  - **Representation phase**: Captures the **as-operated** behavior of the robot’s first axis, including wear, load variations, and environmental factors (e.g., temperature effects on friction)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification/Validation**:
    - **Sensor Calibration**: Two encoders per axis reduce positional uncertainty by measuring elasticity/friction via encoder differences.
    - **Model Validation**: Simulation models (e.g., Simulink) are validated against measured data traces (e.g., torque/velocity deviations).
  - **Uncertainty Management**:
    - **Friction Models**: White-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models account for load, temperature, and wear effects.
    - **Traceability**: Data traces originate from sensors or simulations, with metadata linking computational steps (e.g., Simulation M → ˆ*r_M*)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (robot) and digital twin is via:
  - **MQTT Protocol**: Real-time data streaming from robot sensors (e.g., motor current, encoders) to the digital shadow.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: Enables structured modeling of the robot’s mechanical structure and behavioral components.
  - **SysML Integration**: SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) define the robot’s subsystem architecture."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is deployed as a **real-time dashboard** integrated with the robot’s CNC controller (Siemens SINUMERIK 840D):
  - **Hosting**: Cloud-based or on-premise server infrastructure (not specified) to process simulation models and data traces.
  - **Deployment**: Executable digital shadow components (e.g., MathWorks Simulink simulations, MQTT data streams) are deployed alongside the robot’s control system."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The digital twin integrates horizontally with:
  - **Robot Control System**: Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller for axis control and data acquisition.
  - **Simulation Tools**: MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for friction modeling and validation.
  - **Data Streams**: MQTT protocol for real-time data exchange with external systems (e.g., monitoring dashboards)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to:
  - **Modeling Standards**: SysML for structural/behavioral modeling.
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model**: Incorporates concepts from Kritzinger et al. [32] and Michael et al. [15] (e.g., Purpose, DataTrace, Model types: Engineering/Simulation/DataCalculation)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The digital twin includes:
  - **Safety**: Robot’s safety cell restricts working range to [-90°, 90°] and limits speed to |q˙_max| = 75°/s to prevent accidents.
  - **Data Security**: MQTT protocol ensures secure communication between sensors and digital shadow components (though specifics on encryption/access control are not detailed)."
]
